characters.name: Apollo
characters.description: ApolloBackground informationVoiceJohn Kennedy (original shorts)Michael Winsor (TV Series)Character informationLikesbarks and howlsSource Apollois a purple and lime green puppy, and the leader of the gang. He's very interested in space travel and often fantasizes about traveling through space in his own rocket ship. As a testament to this dream, he has the insignia of Project Apollo (the NASA program that landed a man on the moon) over his bed.

characters.name: Apollo

characters.name: Bedtime Bunny
characters.description: Bedtime BunnyBackground informationVoiceDonna KimballSource Bedtime Bunnyis a rabbit who lives in the Land Of Hush and the first TV-Exclusive character in the Pajanimals TV Series. Bedtime Bunny would sometimes fall asleep during conversations. Whenever a loud noise is heard, Bedtime Bunny would widen her eyes and fall to the ground (for example, in A Super Sweet Night, Cowbella's voice became loud and yucky and rusty when Bedtime Bunny falls to the ground). Like Bedtime Bear in the Care Bears, Bedtime Bunny would sleep and dream of anything she likes. The Pajanimals would ride on Cowbella's bed or Sweetpea Sue's bed to her for advice. She appeared in one episode.

Like Bedtime Bear in the Care Bears, Bedtime Bunny would sleep and dream of anything she likes. The Pajanimals would ride on Cowbella's bed or Sweetpea Sue's bed to her for advice. She appeared in one episode.

characters.name: Coach Whistler
characters.description: Coach WhistlerBackground informationVoicePaul CurrieCharacter informationGenderMaleSpeciesWalrusSource Coach Whistleris a dark blue walrus coach with a red-banded whistle who lives in the Land of Play. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed, Sweetpea Sue's bed, or Cowbella's bed to him. Coach Whistler is always big on team spirit. (performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: Coach Whistler

(performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: CowBella
characters.description: CowBellaBackground informationVoiceAlice Dinnean (original shorts)Sarah Lyle (TV Series)Character informationLikesmoos and bellowsSource CowBellais a pink, purple and white cow calf with an Italian accent in the shorts, and a Magnolian Accent in the TV series, who sometimes speaks using Italian phrases such as "Buon giorno" or "Mamma mia!" She is a very well-mannered cow and loves elegance. She also enjoys playing dress-up. Her name is a pun on the Italian phrase "Ciao bello". In the TV series, she seems to have lost her Italian accent. Along withSquacky, she is about a year younger thanApolloandSweetpea Sue.

She is a very well-mannered cow and loves elegance. She also enjoys playing dress-up. Her name is a pun on the Italian phrase "Ciao bello". In the TV series, she seems to have lost her Italian accent. Along withSquacky, she is about a year younger thanApolloandSweetpea Sue.

characters.name: Edwin
characters.description: EdwinBackground informationVoicePaul CurrieCharacter informationGenderMaleSource Edwinis an orange-skinned, bespectacled man who lives in Storybook Land. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Cowbella's bed to him. Edwin plays different roles during the Pajanimals' visits to Storybook Land. (he's performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: Edwin
characters.description: EdwinBackground informationVoicePaul CurrieCharacter informationGenderMaleSource Edwinis an orange-skinned, bespectacled man who lives in Storybook Land. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Cowbella's bed to him. Edwin plays different roles during the Pajanimals' visits to Storybook Land. (he's performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: Ellie Octopus
characters.description: Ellie OctopusBackground informationVoiceSarah LyleCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesOctopusSource Ellie Octopusis a purple octopus that lives in the Big Blue Sea. In her first appearance in "An Octopus Hug," Sweetpea Sue was afraid of octopuses until she met Ellie who was also afraid of the Pajanimals. The Pajanimals would often go to her for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed to her. Ellie would always give the Pajanimals "octopus huggles." (she's performed by Sarah Lyle)

characters.name: Ellie Octopus
characters.description: Ellie OctopusBackground informationVoiceSarah LyleCharacter informationGenderFemaleSpeciesOctopusSource Ellie Octopusis a purple octopus that lives in the Big Blue Sea. The Pajanimals would often go to her for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed to her. Ellie would always give the Pajanimals "octopus huggles." (she's performed by Sarah Lyle)

characters.name: Granny Pearl
characters.description: Granny PearlBackground informationVoiceDonna KimballSourceGranny Pearlis an elderly green sea turtle who lives in the Big Blue Sea. The Pajanimals would often go to her for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed to her. She is a replacement for Ellie Octopus who is absent in the 2nd season. (She is performed by Donna Kimball)

(She is performed by Donna Kimball)

characters.name: Hank and Frank
characters.description: Hank and FrankBackground informationVoiceVictor Yerrid (Hank)Paul Currie (Frank)Source Hank and Frank- two brown beaver brothers. They live in the Land of Build-It where they work as construction workers. The Pajanimals would often go to them for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed or Apollo's bed to them. (They're performed by Victor Yerrid and Paul Currie)

characters.name: Hank and Frank
characters.description: Hank and FrankBackground informationVoiceVictor Yerrid (Hank)Paul Currie (Frank)Source Hank and Frank- two brown beaver brothers. They live in the Land of Build-It where they work as construction workers. The Pajanimals would often go to them for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed or Apollo's bed to them. (They're performed by Victor Yerrid and Paul Currie)

characters.name: Jerry Bear
characters.description: Jerry BearBackground informationVoiceVictor YerridSource Jerry Bearis a yellow bear. He lives in the Friendly Forest. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed, Cowbella's bed, Apollo's bed, or Sweetpea Sue's bed to him. He would often give bear hugs to the Pajanimals. (he's performed by Victor Yerrid)

characters.name: Jerry Bear
characters.description: Jerry BearBackground informationVoiceVictor YerridSource Jerry Bearis a yellow bear. He lives in the Friendly Forest. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Squacky's bed, Cowbella's bed, Apollo's bed, or Sweetpea Sue's bed to him. He would often give bear hugs to the Pajanimals. (he's performed by Victor Yerrid)

characters.name: Mom
characters.description: Mom is the Pajanimals mom, and her face is never shown. On some of the episodes, she tells the pajanimals five more minutes until bedtime and tells the pajanimals goodnight; and she sings the theme song and the lullaby song.

characters.name: Moon
characters.description: MoonBackground informationVoiceMichael WinsorSource Moonis a bespectacled nightcap-wearing personification of the moon that is found in the night sky. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Apollo's bed to him. (he is performed by Michael Winsor)

characters.name: Moon
characters.description: MoonBackground informationVoiceMichael WinsorSource Moonis a bespectacled nightcap-wearing personification of the moon that is found in the night sky. The Pajanimals would often go to him for bedtime advice when they ride Apollo's bed to him. (he is performed by Michael Winsor)

characters.name: Mr. Happy Birthday
characters.description: Mr. Happy BirthdayBackground informationVoiceJosh ElwellSourceMr. Happy Birthdayis a dark blue and orange porcupine who is the mascot of all birthdays. He lives in Birthday Land. The Pajanimals would occasionally go to him for birthday advice when they ride Sweetpea Sue's bed or Cowbella's bed to him. Mr. Happy Birthday has a tendency to mispronounce the word Pajanimals. A running gag in the show is that his quills tend to pop any nearby balloons that touch them. (he's performed by Josh Elwell)

characters.name: Mr. Happy Birthday
characters.description: Mr. Happy BirthdayBackground informationVoiceJosh ElwellSourceMr. Happy Birthdayis a dark blue and orange porcupine who is the mascot of all birthdays. He lives in Birthday Land. The Pajanimals would occasionally go to him for birthday advice when they ride Sweetpea Sue's bed or Cowbella's bed to him. Mr. Happy Birthday has a tendency to mispronounce the word Pajanimals. A running gag in the show is that his quills tend to pop any nearby balloons that touch them. (he's performed by Josh Elwell)

characters.name: Otis Owl
characters.description: Otis OwlBackground informationVoicePaul CurrieSource Otis Owlis an owl who first appeared in season 2 who is good friends with Jerry Bear. He lives in the Friendly Forest. Otis Owl and Jerry Bear first met at Woodwork School. Otis gives a loud hoot when he is excited. (he is performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: Otis Owl
characters.description: Otis OwlBackground informationVoicePaul CurrieSource Otis Owlis an owl who first appeared in season 2 who is good friends with Jerry Bear. He lives in the Friendly Forest. Otis Owl and Jerry Bear first met at Woodwork School. Otis gives a loud hoot when he is excited. (he is performed by Paul Currie)

characters.name: Squacky
characters.description: SquackyBackground informationVoiceVictor YerridCharacter informationLikesquacksSource Squacky, the youngest of the group, is a very excitable blue and yellow duckling. He is very hyper, loves to play practical jokes and is often seen bouncing off the walls (literally). He does, however, have a passion for reading, which is one of the few things that helps him settle down. Furthermore, he has a Daffy Duck-esque lisp. Along withCowBella, he is about a year younger thanApolloandSweetpea Sue.

characters.name: Sweetpea Sue
characters.description: Sweetpea SueBackground informationVoiceDonna KimballCharacter informationLikesneighs and whinniesSource Sweetpea Sue, the protagonist of the series, is a pink and orange thoroughbred pony filly with a Texas accent. She has pink hair and hooves, buck teeth, long tall ears and talks in a soft light voice. She is a bit of a leader type (and possiblyApollo's second-in-command) and can get the other Pajanimals on-track when they want to stay up late at night and play.
